channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Deadly Maui fire erupted from earlier blaze believed to have been extinguished, investigation finds
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — The wildfire that killed at least 102 people on Maui last year erupted from an earlier brushfire, sparked by downed power lines, that firefighters believed they had extinguished, officials confirmed Wednesday as they presented their findings on the cause of the tragedy. The Aug.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Shoppers are panic-buying toilet paper amid port strike, but experts say there’s no need
item.description: “Hope you have some toilet paper stock piled. It’s started. Sam’s and Costco are depleted,” one user said on the social media platform X.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KRON4

item.title: Mayorkas warns FEMA doesn't have enough funding to last through hurricane season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Federal Emergency Management Agency can meet immediate needs but does not have enough funding to make it through the hurricane season, Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas told reporters Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man kills mountain lion with shovel in self-defense
item.description: CPW said the man told the officer he was sitting outside his car with his dog the previous night when a mountain lion approached them.
item.dc:creator: Norishka Pachot, NewsNation

item.title: Helene's flooding swept away 11 workers at a Tennessee factory. Now the state is investigating
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee state authorities said Wednesday they are investigating the company that owns a plastics factory where 11 workers were swept away by cataclysmic flooding unleashed by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wyoming town told to 'ready' for evacuation as wildfire spreads 32,000 acres
item.description: The town of Dayton, Wyoming, has been put on a "ready to evacuate" status as a massive wildfire continues to spread across the Bighorn National Forest just six miles away.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: ACLU lawsuit details DWI scheme rocking Albuquerque police
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A civil rights group is suing the city of Albuquerque, its police department and top officials on behalf of a man who was among those arrested on suspicion of driving while intoxicated and allegedly forced to pay bribes to get the charges dropped.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Helene's victims include first responders who died helping others
item.description: Falling trees and raging floods from Hurricane Helene killed more than 150 people when it struck Florida late last week and then plowed through the Southeast as one of the deadliest storms in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: BRENDAN FARRINGTON and DAVID FISCHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How much do longshoremen make?
item.description: Dockworkers want a $5 per hour yearly wage increase in their new contract. Here's how much they currently make.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: DHS warns of risks around Oct. 7, November election in annual threat assessment
item.description: “We are, of course, aware that that anniversary may add even more fuel to an already challenging and heightened threat environment,” a DHS official said.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Kamala Harris backs striking port workers, knocks Trump
item.description: “This strike is about fairness. Foreign-owned shipping companies have made record profits and executive compensation has grown,” Harris said.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Chevy and GMC truck owners could get up to $12,700 as part of $35M settlement
item.description: Owners of the affected trucks could get anywhere from $400 to $12,712. Here's how to tell if you qualify.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, KRON4

item.title: Harris backs striking port workers, knocks Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris voiced her support Wednesday for striking port workers while bashing her rival former President Donald Trump after tens of thousands of longshoremen at ports along the East Coast and Gulf of Mexico walked off the job.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Are LGBTQ Jews welcome in Orthodox communities? This is how they are building spaces of their own
item.description: It was a heart-wrenching choice. But when Daniel Gammerman decided to never set foot back in an Orthodox synagogue, he thought of it as an act of love. Not toward the Jewish community he was born into, but to himself.
item.dc:creator: MARÍA TERESA HERNÁNDEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nantucket's migrant crisis handling called out after quiet island rocked by wave of violent attacks
item.description: Toby Brown, head of Nantucket's GOP, wants more vetting on the island after illegal migrants accused of sex crimes and assault there were seized by ICE.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Doctor who helped supply Matthew Perry ketamine pleads guilty to drug charge
item.description: A San Diego doctor charged in connection with Matthew Perry's fatal overdose has pleaded guilty to conspiring to distribute the surgical anesthetic ketamine.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dalton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Poll: Who won the Walz-Vance VP Debate?
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Political scientists will tell you that vice presidential nominees rarely swing the election in favor of the candidate at the top of the ticket. But poll after poll shows this election cycle coming down to a percentage point across a handful of key swing states.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, KRON4

item.title: CBS cuts mics of Vance, Walz during immigration argument
item.description: The sparring started when Brennan clarified for debate viewers that Springfield “does have a large number of Haitian migrants who have legal status, temporary protected status.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KRON4

item.title: Walz misleadingly claims to have been in Hong Kong during period tied to Tiananmen Square massacre
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Multiple news reports indicate that Democratic vice presidential nominee Minnesota Gov.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and DIDI TANG Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump downplays troop injuries in 2020 missile strike: 'You mean because they had a headache?'
item.description: "So first of all, injured. What does injured mean? Injured means — you mean because they had a headache? Because the bombs never hit the fort," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tennessee plastics factory employee recounts narrow escape through floodwater
item.description: Impact Plastics employee Zinna Adkins stepped outside her workplace at 10:54 a.m. on Friday and captured water rising in the parking lot on her cellphone. But at that time, she said no supervisor informed employees they were free to leave.
item.dc:creator: Karen Jenkins, Fox 5

item.title: California firefighters in Hurricane Helene relief team recovering after crash in Texas
item.description: In a statement on Facebook, the San Diego Fire-Rescue Department thanked the community for their support during this difficult time.
item.dc:creator: Christa Swanson, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Helene relief: Mules helping to bring supplies to residents in North Carolina
item.description: Residents in communities in western North Carolina are getting needed supplies and aide from mules following heavy damage from Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massachusetts dealership scheme victim: 'I feel like I'm living in a movie'
item.description: Edward Cicciu, 46, of Attleboro, is accused of receiving cars on loan from local auctions but not obtaining the titles.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Brill, NewsNation

item.title: NY race for US Senate: Gillibrand talks Adams indictment, term limits, economy
item.description: Come Nov. 5, the 15-year Democratic senator will defend her seat against Republican challenger Mike Sapraicone.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, NewsNation

item.title: JD Vance, Tim Walz face off in 2024 VP debate: Key takeaways
item.description: Republican J.D. Vance and Democrat Tim Walz met Tuesday in the lone vice presidential debate of the 2024 election, bringing together undercards who have spent two months going after each other and the opposing nominees who top the major-party tickets.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KTLA 5

item.title: Iran fires at least 180 missiles into Israel as regionwide conflict grows
item.description: Iran launched at least 180 missiles into Israel on Tuesday, the latest in a series of escalating attacks in a yearslong conflict between Israel and Iran and its Arab allies that threatens to push the Middle East closer toward a regionwide war.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, KTLA 5

item.title: Teens arrested for stomping on man's head during brutal armed attack in Baltimore
item.description: Two teens have been arrested for a brutal caught-on-video attack in Baltimore where a 66-year-old man was stomped in the head and mugged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iran fires at least 180 missiles into Israel as regionwide conflict grows
item.description: Iran launched at least 180 missiles into Israel on Tuesday, the latest in a series of escalating attacks in a yearslong conflict between Israel and Iran and its Arab allies that threatens to push the Middle East closer toward a regionwide war.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, Fox 5

item.title: My car was submerged in floodwaters. Should I start it?
item.description: Storm surges and flooding from Hurricane Helene have caused widespread devastation across parts of the Southeastern U.S., in some cases leaving homes and cars completely underwater.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Israel says Iran has fired missiles at Israel and it warned residents to shelter in place
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — The Israeli military said Tuesday that Iran has fired missiles at Israel, and air raid sirens sounded across the country as residents were ordered to remain close to bomb shelters. Israel and the United States have warned there would be severe consequences if Iran attacks.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, JULIA FRANKEL and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Crews search for survivors in North Carolina's mountains days after Helene's deluge
item.description: SWANNANOA, N.C. (AP) — Rescuers fanned out across the mountains of western North Carolina on Tuesday in search of anyone still unaccounted for since Hurricane Helene’s remnants caused catastrophic damage to the Southeast, with a death toll nearing 140 people.
item.dc:creator: ERIK VERDUZCO and JEFFREY COLLINS Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2 Martha’s Vineyard illegal immigrants arrested on same day in latest ICE busts on wealthy, liberal islands
item.description: A drug trafficker from Brazil and a Salvadoran accused of crimes against humanity in his own country, both in the country illegally, were taken into custody on Martha's Vineyard.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Murders, mayhem and officer's gunfire lead to charges at Brooklyn jail where 'Diddy' is held
item.description: Criminal charges unsealed Monday offer a fresh window into violence and dysfunction that has plagued the Brooklyn federal jail where Sean “Diddy” Combs and Sam Bankman-Fried are locked up.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, KRON4

item.title: Helene's death toll surpasses 150 as crews continue to search for survivors
item.description: Exhausted emergency workers continued to work around-the-clock to clear roads, restore power and cellphone service, and reach people left stranded by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump and Harris' running mates are set to face off and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California governor vetoes bill to create first-in-nation AI safety measures
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California Gov. Gavin Newsom vetoed a landmark bill aimed at establishing first-in-the-nation safety measures for large artificial intelligence models Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, ABC 4
